checks.name: at least 4 callables in pipeline.py (top-level + 3 helpers)
checks.command: python3 -c "import ast; tree = ast.parse(open('pipeline.py').read()); n = sum(1 for node in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(node, (ast.FunctionDef, ast.AsyncFunctionDef))); assert n >= 4, f'only {n} callables, want >= 4'"

checks.name: pipeline still callable with original signature + shape
checks.command: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); from pipeline import pipeline; r = pipeline('alice, 92\nbob, 75'); assert r['rows'][0] == {'name': 'alice', 'score': 92, 'grade': 'A'}; assert 'bob: 75 (C)' in r['report']"
